name: alchemy-codex-local-mode
description: Explicit Codex-native constraint admission for conversation-only images

interface.shortDescription: Alchemy guardrails for Codex native ImageGen.
interface.longDescription: A disabled-by-default constraint-admission plugin. Alchemy freezes facts and guardrails; Codex authors the natural-language direction and creates the conversation-only image itself.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Native ImageGen Mode only when I explicitly request it. Obtain Alchemy guardrails, author each natural-language image direction here, then create the conversation-only image; do not treat it as an Alchemy delivery.
